title: Using GROUP BY ALL with conditional projection causes "Binder Error: Cannot mix aggregates with non-aggregated columns!"
description:
### What happens?

if you have a conditional projection with GROUP BY ALL,  you get `Binder Error: Cannot mix aggregates with non-aggregated columns!`

My wish would be that `group by all` could also be applied on conditional projections (if(), case when, etc.).

### To Reproduce

```
create table testgroup (id int, isB2b int, priceGross decimal(10, 2), priceNet decimal(10, 2));
insert into testgroup values (1, 2, 3, 4);

select *, if(isB2b = 1, sum(priceGross), sum(priceNet)) FROM testgroup group by all;
Binder Error: Cannot mix aggregates with non-aggregated columns!

select *, case when isB2b = 1 then sum(priceGross) else sum(priceNet) end FROM testgroup group by all;
Binder Error: Cannot mix aggregates with non-aggregated columns!

select *, case when isB2b = 1 then sum(priceGross) else 0 end FROM testgroup group by all;
Binder Error: Cannot mix aggregates with non-aggregated columns!
```

### OS:

Linux, amd64

### DuckDB Version:

v1.0.0 1f98600c2c

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Full Name:

Thomas Bley

### Affiliation:

myself

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [X] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [X] Yes, I have
poc: create table testgroup (id int, isB2b int, priceGross decimal(10, 2), priceNet decimal(10, 2));
select *, if(isB2b = 1, sum(priceGross), sum(priceNet)) FROM testgroup group by all;
select *, case when isB2b = 1 then sum(priceGross) else sum(priceNet) end FROM testgroup group by all;
select *, case when isB2b = 1 then sum(priceGross) else 0 end FROM testgroup group by all;

SELECT *, 
    SUM( IF(isB2b = 1, priceGross, priceNet)) 
FROM testgroup 
GROUP BY ALL;
select *, if(isB2b = 1, sum(priceGross), avg(priceNet)) FROM testgroup group by all;
select *, if(isB2b = 1, sum(priceGross), 42) FROM testgroup group by all;

SELECT *, 
    COALESCE(SUM(IF(isB2b = 1, priceGross, NULL)), AVG(IF(isB2b = 1,  NULL, priceNet))))
FROM testgroup
GROUP BY ALL;

SELECT *, 
    COALESCE(SUM(IF(isB2b = 1, priceGross, NULL)), 42)
FROM testgroup
GROUP BY ALL;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY ALL with conditional projections
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testgroup2 (id int, isB2b int, priceGross decimal(10, 2), priceNet decimal(10, 2), discount decimal(10, 2));
SELECT *, IF(isB2b = 1, SUM(priceGross - discount), SUM(priceNet)) FROM testgroup2 GROUP BY ALL;
SELECT *, CASE WHEN isB2b = 1 THEN SUM(priceGross) ELSE SUM(priceNet + discount) END FROM testgroup2 GROUP BY ALL;
SELECT *, COALESCE(SUM(IF(isB2b = 1, priceGross, NULL)), AVG(priceNet)) FROM testgroup2 GROUP BY ALL;
